use_cases: Showcasing SaaS product features with app mockups on landing pages
Displaying dual product images with animated text descriptions
Creating visually impactful dark-themed sections for scroll-triggered reveals
Featuring software demos with alternating layout options
ai_summary: A dark-themed section component designed for showcasing product features or services using dual mockup images. Features scroll-triggered staggered animations via Framer Motion with responsive grid layout that supports reversible positioning for alternating section layouts. Primarily used in SaaS and software product landing pages to create visual impact with minimal, clean typography on black backgrounds.
